LangGeneral.adventurer_info.text: The Adventurer is a PC only support-type Tourist promotion that is focused on exploration. While they lack the offensive benefits of other classes, they make up for it with their unique exploration based abilities and passives, leading the way into nefias, and out with heavier pockets.
LangGeneral.adventurerquest_assault_prog: Ensure no more than 5 enemies are contesting the Assault Banner area for #1 turn(s). #2 enemies are contesting.
LangGeneral.adventurerquest_defend_progr: Defend the Defense Banner area for #1 turn(s). This quest will fail if 5 or more enemies are able to contest. #2 enemies are contesting.
LangGeneral.adventurerquest_escort_progr: Reach the extraction area with the escort wagon alive to complete the quest.
LangGeneral.adventurerquest_rescue_progr: Reach the stranded allied forces before they are overwhelmed. #1 survivor(s) remain.
Reach the extraction area to escape and complete the quest.
LangGeneral.artificer_golem_warning.text: Warning! An Artificer can only create one Golem due to how powerful they are. Are you sure you want this golem configuration?
LangGeneral.artificer_info.text: The Artificer is a creation based Witch promotion that creates all kinds of magical devices for combat. The tools produced by an Artificer have a wide variety of effects for both friend and foe. Artificers can also produce their own golem ally, a heavily customizable partner that can come in various configurations.
LangGeneral.artificerlocked_table.text: This crafter can only be used by Artificers.
LangGeneral.battlemage_info.text:
The Battlemage is an stance-based Warmage promotion that focuses on frontline combat. By utilizing an increased amount of mana they can increase their offensive spellpower and/or their survivability.
When Battlemages summon elemental funnels, they will be summoned as defensive focused Shield Funnels.
Battlemages possess two unique different stances. Both stances will reserve a portion of the mana to boost either their defensive or offensive capabilities. These stances can be used at the same time.
LangGeneral.berserker_info.text: The Berserker is an offensive Warrior promotion that flourishes at the front lines. They grow stronger both defensively and offensively the more damage they take, living life on the edge to maximize their damage output.
LangGeneral.classlocked_ability.text: This ability cannot be used unless you are a #1.
LangGeneral.covertops_abduction_progress: Go to #2 and use the provided Snag Ball to capture #1. Do not kill the target.
LangGeneral.covertops_assassinate_progre: Assassinate #1, they should be in #2 somewhere.
LangGeneral.covertops_contact_progress_1: Go to #2 and make contact with the Crow Agent.
LangGeneral.covertops_contact_progress_2: Bring the Intel Package back to #3.
LangGeneral.covertops_intel_progress_1.t: Go to #2 and scope out the marked Intel spots.
LangGeneral.covertops_intel_progress_2.t: Speak with the Crow Agent in #2 and turn in the collected Intel.
LangGeneral.covertops_plant_progress.tex: Place the Incriminating Evidence in the #1 in #2.
LangGeneral.covertops_steal_progress_1.t: Make your way past the guards and steal the #1.
LangGeneral.covertops_steal_progress_2.t: Reach the extraction area to escape with the #1 and complete the quest.
LangGeneral.daggerillusion_nothrowingwea: You must have a throwing weapon to use this ability.
LangGeneral.dancer_info.text:
The Dancer is a support-type Pianist promotion that spreads buffs and debuffs across the battlefield with their exotic dances. They possess a multitude of mystical dances in their repetoire, as well as additional offensive flourishes that can be used during their dances.
Dancers can also choose to support a single ally with the Partner Stance, focusing the buffs on their single ally and themselves.
LangGeneral.dancer_mustbedancing.text: You must be dancing to use this ability.
LangGeneral.demotion_confirmation.text: Are you sure #1 should be demoted?
LangGeneral.dreadknight_info.text: The Dread Knight is an offensive Warmage promotion that believes life is merely a resource to be used in their pursuit of magic. They dominate the battlefield with relentless offensive capabilities whilst they walk the thin line between life and death, using their own health to empower their spells.
LangGeneral.druid_info.text:
The Druid is a support and summoning type Farmer promotion that brings forth nature's vitality to the battlefield. They can summon various kinds of plantlife to strengthen their allies or weaken their enemies.
Druids can convert other summoning-type spellbooks into their own spell, the Summon Tree Ent Warrior spell.
LangGeneral.elementalist_info.text:
The Elementalist is an offensive Wizard promotion that unleashes an unending barrage of magical spells. They use elemental spells of all kinds to build up momentum, blowing away their opponents with sheer firepower.
When Elementalists summon elemental funnels, they will summon multiple at once to serve as additional firepower.
LangGeneral.etoile_info.text:
The Etoile is a melee-oriented scion class. Boasting impressive defenses, they can deflect attacks while rushing down the enemy, making space between allies and their enemies.
Luminaries can utilize their Vanguard Stance to redirect all damage directed at their allies instead to themselves.
When Luminaries summon elemental funnels, they will summon melee oriented Sword Funnels instead.
LangGeneral.gambler_info.text: The Gambler is a luck based offshoot Promotion. Their abilities possess extreme randomness, making them capable of changing the tides of battle in either direction in a blink of an eye. Gamblers heavily depend on their Luck attribute, using it to increase the odds of their abilities producing positive results.
LangGeneral.harbinger_info.text: The Harbinger is a debuff oriented Executioner promotion that focuses on spreading miasma across the battlefield. Capable of applying a variety of miasma effects, they grow stronger as their enemies are choking under the relentess assault of miasma.
LangGeneral.headhunter_info.text: The Headhunter is an offensive Executioner promotion that thrives on momentum. They grow stronger with kills, gaining temporary buffs with each enemy slain in a single battle. They are also capable of executing low health enemies to further increase their own power.
LangGeneral.hermit_info.text: The Hermit is an offensive Thief promotion that works from the shadows to assassinate targets. They are able to conceal themselves from view, waiting for the opportune moment to strike and eliminate their target.
LangGeneral.hexer_info.text: The Hexer is a debuff oriented Witch promotion that capitalizes on applying a variety of ailments. Capable of hexing their enemies with both physical and mental conditions, Hexers pile on the ailments, becoming more and more dangerous as they stack up.
LangGeneral.hintBerserkerAnger.text: Missing at least 50% HP, Anger active.
LangGeneral.hintBerserkerDefiance.text: Missing at least 25% HP, Defiance active.
LangGeneral.hintBerserkerFury.text: Missing at least 75% HP, Fury active.
LangGeneral.hintBlackTea.text: Regenerating 5% of your maximum stamina every 5 turns.
LangGeneral.hintChamomileTea.text: Regenerating 5% of your maximum health every 5 turns.
LangGeneral.hintElementalist.text: Elementalists stockpile excess elemental essences to utilize as devastating magic.
LangGeneral.hintGreenTea.text: Regenerating 5% of your maximum mana every 5 turns.
LangGeneral.hintJenei.text: Elemental spirits gather around the Jenei as they wield their powers. With enough of them Jenei can perform great spirit summons.
LangGeneral.hintJeneiJupiter.text: #1 Spirit(s) of Wind are standing by.
LangGeneral.hintJeneiMars.text: #1 Spirit(s) of Fire are standing by.
LangGeneral.hintJeneiMercury.text: #1 Spirit(s) of Water are standing by.
LangGeneral.hintJeneiVenus.text: #1 Spirit(s) of Earth are standing by.
LangGeneral.hintManaShieldDelay.text: #1 turn(s) of Mana Shield Recharge Delay.
LangGeneral.hintOsmanthusTea.text: Reduces Ether Disease buildup every 5 turns.
LangGeneral.hintRanger_ShatterCoating.te: Your shots will splinter to two additional targets.
LangGeneral.holyknight_info.text: The Holy Knight is a defensive Paladin promotion that rushes the enemy with a host of Holy attacks. Boasting impressive survivability, they utilize their skills to protect and sustain themselves, as well as create Holy Sword bits to assist them in combat.
LangGeneral.jenei_info.text: The Jenei is an offensive spellcaster Farmer promotion that specializes in the four natural elements. They can gather spirits of Earth, Fire, Wind, and Water to aid them, combining their powers to summon great representatives of the natural forces to aid them in combat.Jenei are aligned with one of the four primal elements, gaining access to additional abilities unique to their element.Jenei can convert other elemental attack spellbooks into one of the four elements they specialize in.
LangGeneral.jenei_promotions.text: Jenei are additionally aligned one one of the four great elements, each possessing abilities specific to that element.
LangGeneral.justicar_info.text: The Justicar is an anti-physical focused Inquisitor promotion. They are able to intimidate and control groups of enemies through their debuffs, reducing their physical abilities.
LangGeneral.knightcaller_info.text:
The Knightcaller is a summoner-type Pianist promotion that commands a ghostly Knight Order. Knights are powerful summons that, while few in number, are exeedingly strong in their own right. The Knightcaller can summon a variety of Knights to the fight, as well as Knight Commanders.
Whenever the Knightcaller summons a knight, they will suffer from summoning sickness, which will temporarily reduce their maximum mana for a short time.
LangGeneral.machinist_info.text:
The Machinist is a summoner-type Gunner promotion which brings overwhelming firepower to the battlefield. Specializing in various kinds of firearms, they are able to load homemade munitions into their firearms and autoturrets.
Machinists can convert other summoning-type spellbooks into their own spell, the Summon Turret spell.
LangGeneral.necromancer_info.text:
The Necromancer is a support-type Wizard promotion that calls for the legion of the undead. They can summon legions of the undead to overwhelm their opponents.
Necromancers can convert other summoning-type spellbooks into their own spell, the Summon Skeleton spell.
LangGeneral.phantom_info.text:
The Phantom is a stylistic and adaptable scion class. By applying marks with their attacks and spells, Phantoms can upgrade their abilities into a Phantom Finisher, which drastically increases the ability's effect, as well as restores the users mana and stamina.
When Phantoms summon elemental funnels, they will summon bolt favoring Phantom Funnels instead.
LangGeneral.promotion_confirmation.text: Are you sure #1 should be promoted?
LangGeneral.ranger_info.text:
The Ranger is a control-type Archer promotion that rides through the battlefield. They use special munitions and traps to debuff enemies.
Rangers possess a unique stance: Ranger's Canto, which allows them to fire even while moving as long as they are mounted.
LangGeneral.runeknight_info.text: The Runeknight is a defensive Sword Sage promotion that focuses on protecting against elements. They are able to use their special Runic Guard ability to attune themselves to an element, gaining completely immunity from that element. The more they absorb of that element, the more powerful their retaliation will be.
LangGeneral.saint_info.text:
The Saint is a spell focused Priest promotion that provides both healing and Holy spell support. They are able to strengthen the connection between their allies and their gods with their unique buff, while providing advanced healing support.
Saints can convert other elemental attack spellbooks into the Holy element.
LangGeneral.sentinel_info.text:
The Sentinel is a defensive Warrior promotion that stands at the front lines. They are able to force enemies to target them instead of their allies, using their own superior defenses to reduce the damage.
Sentinels possess both offensive and defensive stances, changing between them as the situation calls for it.
LangGeneral.sharpshooter_info.text:
The Sharpshooter is a defensive Gunner promotion which flourish on the backlines. They provide deadly accurate suppressive fire and target marking for their team.
Sharpshooters possess the Overwatch Stance, which will reduce their speed, but allows them to establish a killzone. Any enemy that moves within this killzone will cause the Sharpshooter to open fire.
LangGeneral.sniper_info.text: The Sniper is an offensive Archer promotion that flourishes at the back lines. They are able to remove priority targets from the fight, either permanently through a vital point, or temporarily through crippling a body part.
LangGeneral.sovereign_info.text: The Sovereign is a support Paladin promotion that oversees the battlefield with their tactics. Sovereigns command multiple buffing abilities that each have two different effects. By changing between Law and Chaos March, they can tune their buffs to be more offensive or defensive in nature.
LangGeneral.spellblade_info.text:
The Spellblade is a debuff oriented Sword Sage promotion that cripples the enemy with precise melee strikes. They can do physical disables by executing crushing strikes, or reduce the enemy's elemental resistance with their enchanted swords.
When Spellblades summon elemental funnels, they will summon melee oriented Sword Funnels instead.
LangGeneral.trickster_info.text: The Trickster is a support-type Thief promotion that controls the battlefield through mental attacks. They are able to lay Arcane Traps that will inflict mental debuffs on their enemies when triggered, as well as create illusions to distract and disrupt the enemy.
LangGeneral.warcleric_info.text: The War Cleric is an defensive Priest promotion that is welcome on any front line. They can save allies from dangerous situations, capable of protecting, healing, or harming as needed.
LangGeneral.witchhunter_info.text:
The Witch Hunter is an anti-magic focused Inquisitor promotion. They possess an array of abilities at their disposal that grants them heavy advantage over any spellcaster, such as silencing or targetting mana as well as life.
Witch Hunters can deploy a Null Zone around them which massively hampers any sort of spellcasting.

SourceCharaText.personage_alestie.aggro:
Orders received.
For the kingdom!
We will vanquish our enemies!
SourceCharaText.personage_alestie.dead:
My consciousness is... going... Everything is…
My body... won't move...! Someone! Answer me…
Not… in a place like this…!
SourceCharaText.personage_arkun.aggro:
Until I find the truth!
I shall fight by your side!
Take back the kingdom!
SourceCharaText.personage_arkun.dead:
Algiery... Where are you? I wanted to see you...
Please... watch over my knights…
I leave everyone... and everything... to you...
SourceCharaText.personage_bodyguard.aggr:
Enemies!
To arms!
Protect the VIP!
SourceCharaText.personage_dias.aggro:
Until my luck in battle runs dry, I shall fight.
I cannot overlook another sacrifice!
Alright. Leave everything to me.
SourceCharaText.personage_dias.dead:
Please forgive me for excusing myself early.
I think... I can leave this to you in confidence.
I'm a little tired...
SourceCharaText.personage_dinatog.aggro:
At last, I will be of use.
This life won't go to waste!
Leave everything else to me!
SourceCharaText.personage_dinatog.dead:
Leaving you behind pains me... Take care of things.
I wonder if I could have been of some use…
I-I pray for your health…
SourceCharaText.personage_ectole.aggro:
I will serve you with all that I am.
Please leave everything to me.
If this makes me of use to you... I shall do it.
SourceCharaText.personage_ectole.dead:
I'm sorry I can't be of much more help than this...
I-I have no regrets. It's up to you, now.
I wanted to feel your arms around me... once... more.
SourceCharaText.personage_knight.aggro:
This breath’ll be your last!
I shall smite you!
Leave it to me!
Attack!
This knight is yours to use as you will!
SourceCharaText.personage_knight.dead:
For... the knight kingdom...
I'm sorry to have brought down my order's name...
We all die... It's only a matter of who goes first...
No... I was supposed to be of use to you...
SourceCharaText.personage_lailah.aggro:
Weapons free.
This could get messy.
Take 'em down.
SourceCharaText.personage_lailah.dead:
I wish... I could share one last drink with…
… Freedom from these nightmares.
Sorry master… I don’t think I lived up to your expectations.
Will I come back… from this one…?
SourceCharaText.personage_louise.aggro:
Hold still, I’ll make this quick.
I will pray for you.
Through the mists.
Clearing the way.
SourceCharaText.personage_louise.dead:
I see the forests...
Sorry sir...
Trust... and... wisdom...
SourceCharaText.personage_minari.aggro:
If I must...
So be it.
Hold them still for me.
SourceCharaText.personage_minari.dead:
Tch...
This is why... I'm not suited for field work.
An end to this tale... I hate it.
SourceCharaText.personage_mitsune.aggro:
Yes... struggle!
Kneel!
Beg for mercy!
Hehe... hahahah!
SourceCharaText.personage_mitsune.dead:
So cold… help me…
But... I'm... one of the good... guys…
Can’t fight… much… more...
SourceCharaText.personage_rolinger.aggro:
Now the real battle begins…
No matter my fate!
I can't let my fellow knights down!
SourceCharaText.personage_rolinger.dead:
...I'm sorry I can't look after you any longer...
I wish I'd been able to drink with you more...
I'm sorry to leave it all on your shoulders…
SourceCharaText.personage_ruras.aggro:
You’re dead!
Outta the way.
Take ‘em out!
SourceCharaText.personage_ruras.dead:
Damn... sorry sis.
Sister... I think I have to go...
Mom... I tried.
Minni... protect Sena...
SourceCharaText.personage_sena.aggro:
Die.
You're in the way.
Exterminate!
I just might enjoy this.
SourceCharaText.personage_sena.dead:
...Brother...sister... I’m sorry.
Ah!
Dad... I couldn't... sorry...
Minari... please protect Ruras...
SourceCharaText.personage_valero.aggro:
For our order!
For the kingdom's honor!
I cannot express my pleasure!
SourceCharaText.personage_valero.dead:
I can finally help you with my very life...
I dare to hope... my power was not wasted.
I'm sorry... If only I'd had more strength…
SourceCharaText.personage_vyers.aggro:
We fight when we must, or die.
Trust and wisdom.
Whatever it takes, I will have it done.
SourceCharaText.personage_vyers.dead:
I suppose this is what I deserve.
I’m sorry… I let you all down…
Clocking out... early.
SourceCharaText.personage_watcher.aggro:
For the Watch!
Smile upon us and bring us to glory!
I shall not fail thee!
Not for glory, but for good!
SourceCharaText.personage_watcher.dead:
Even though I fall... there will be others to take my place!
Tis... no great loss.

SourceElement.ActAlrauneConsume.name: Consume Prey
SourceElement.ActAlrauneConsume.textExtr: Usable on non boss non unique enemies below 10% HP and afflicted with Infatuation to consume them and gain attributes based on the power of the victim and the users Taming level,Spits out the victim's belongings with a little bit of extra acid,Cannot be used while still digesting a previous victim
SourceElement.ActArcaneTrap.detail: Sets an Arcane trap at the target location that triggers when stepped on by an enemy.
SourceElement.ActArcaneTrap.name: Arcane Trap
SourceElement.ActArtificerTool.detail: You should not have this ability. This is an advanced ActZap, which needs an Artificer Tool object to work with. Cast this manually at your own risk.
SourceElement.ActArtificerTool.name: Use Artificer Tool
SourceElement.ActAssassinate.detail: Executes an accurate grievous strike against a marked enemy with at least 10 Stalk. Deals 25% more damage at 20 Stalk, and 100% more damage with guaranteed Crit at 30 Stalk.
SourceElement.ActAssassinate.name: Assassinate
SourceElement.ActBeckonOfTheDead.detail: Marks the target for reanimation. An enemy dying when marked will raise a skeleton under your control.
SourceElement.ActBeckonOfTheDead.name: Beckon of the Dead
SourceElement.ActBlessedArmaments.detail: Enchants your weapon with the benevolent power of sunlight, which causes your attacks to heal you for 30% of the damage dealt.
SourceElement.ActBlessedArmaments.name: Blessed Armaments
SourceElement.ActBlessing.detail: Blesses the target with a buff that increases their devoutness.
SourceElement.ActBlessing.name: Blessing
SourceElement.ActBlessingOfTheDead.detai: Sacrifices the targeted undead minion to heal you and your allies.
SourceElement.ActBlessingOfTheDead.name: Blessing of the Dead
SourceElement.ActBloodCurse.detail: Applies a curse to the target. Cost: 10% HP.
SourceElement.ActBloodCurse.name: Blood Curse
SourceElement.ActBloodlust.detail: Enters a Bloodlust state, silencing yourself but boosting attributes, regeneration, and enabling counterattacks. Cost: 25% HP.
SourceElement.ActBloodlust.name: Bloodlust
SourceElement.ActCardThrow.detail: Draws from a magical deck to throw cards at your enemies. Aim for Blackjack!
SourceElement.ActCardThrow.name: Card Throw
SourceElement.ActChargedShot.detail: Charge your next ranged attack with mana, increasing its damage based on the amount consumed. Cost: 25% of your current mana.
SourceElement.ActChargedShot.name: Charged Shot
SourceElement.ActCondemn.detail: Chains enemies around the target point, entangling them and granting Protection to the Justicar’s allies. If you are good aligned, you will boost the critical chance and damage of nearby allies. If you are evil aligned, your chains can inflict burning.
SourceElement.ActCondemn.name: Condemn
SourceElement.ActCorpseExplosion.detail: Sacrifices the targeted undead minion, detonating them to damage surrounding enemies.
SourceElement.ActCorpseExplosion.name: Corpse Explosion
SourceElement.ActCrushingStrike.detail: Executes a melee attack targeting a random body part of the enemy, applying debuffs based on which part was struck.
SourceElement.ActCrushingStrike.name: Crushing Strike
SourceElement.ActDaggerIllusion.detail: Throws a fan of knives at up to 5 nearby enemies, inflicting statuses. Only usable while dancing.
SourceElement.ActDaggerIllusion.name: Dagger Illusion
SourceElement.ActDancePartner.detail: Designates an ally as your dance partner. Your dances affect only you and your partner at 50% increased effect.
SourceElement.ActDancePartner.name: Dance Partner
SourceElement.ActDarkBarrier.detail: Consumes your Dark Traces to grant yourself Protection, based on the count of stacks and your Max HP.
SourceElement.ActDarkBarrier.name: Dark Barrier
SourceElement.ActDarkBurst.detail: Sacrifices your own health to deal dark damage in an area around you and adds a stack of Dark Traces.
SourceElement.ActDarkBurst.name: Dark Burst
SourceElement.ActDeflection.detail: Ready yourself to deflect incoming attacks for one turn. Successfully deflecting negates damage and reduces this skill’s cooldown. Cooldown: 3 Turns
SourceElement.ActDeflection.name: Deflection
SourceElement.ActDeploySanctuary.detail: Establish a Sanctuary in an area around you, reducing damage taken by 75%. Applies to both allies and enemies.
SourceElement.ActDeploySanctuary.name: Deploy Sanctuary
SourceElement.ActDetonateTrap.detail: Detonates a target Arcane trap manually.
SourceElement.ActDetonateTrap.name: Detonate Trap
SourceElement.ActDiceStrike.detail: Rolls a pair of dice to deal an empowered melee strike. Should probably avoid Snake-eyes.
SourceElement.ActDiceStrike.name: Dice Strike
SourceElement.ActDiversion.detail: Summons multiple Phantom Tricksters to fight for you.
SourceElement.ActDiversion.name: Diversion
SourceElement.ActDivineDescent.detail: Embodies yourself as the avatar of your god, massively boosting your stats based on Faith.
SourceElement.ActDivineDescent.name: Divine Descent
SourceElement.ActDivineFist.detail: Attacks the enemy with a holy fist. Will shoot out four holy bolts on hit that will damage enemies and heal allies.
SourceElement.ActDivineFist.name: Divine Fist
SourceElement.ActElementalExtinction.det: Consumes all elemental orbs to summon a barrage of elemental meteors to annihilate your enemy. The attacks will continue if the original target dies and there are other targets nearby. You must have at least 4 different kinds of elemental orbs to use this ability.
SourceElement.ActElementalFury.detail: Consumes all elemental orbs to create an elemental storm that damages all nearby enemies each turn. You must have at least 4 different kinds of elemental orbs to use this ability.
SourceElement.ActElementalFury.name: Elemental Fury
SourceElement.ActEndlessMists.detail: Extends the duration of all Miasma-type conditions on nearby enemies.
SourceElement.ActEndlessMists.name: Endless Mists
SourceElement.ActExecute.detail: Executes a precision melee attack that instantly kills any enemy under 25% HP. Refunds Stamina and removes cooldown if successful. Cooldown: 10 Turns.
SourceElement.ActExecute.name: Execute
SourceElement.ActFormationOrder.detail: Organize your forces into formations. Law March applies Barricade Formation; Chaos March applies Sword Formation. Cooldown: 10 Turns
SourceElement.ActFormationOrder.name: Formation Order
SourceElement.ActGimmickCoating.detail: Modifies your ranged attacks with additional effects.
SourceElement.ActGimmickCoating.name: Gimmick Coating
SourceElement.ActHandOfGod.detail: Greatly heals all nearby allies and applies Greater Regeneration. Cooldown: 30 Turns
SourceElement.ActHandOfGod.name: Hand of God
SourceElement.ActHolyBanner.detail: Plants a Holy Banner that protects allies and damages enemies around it.
SourceElement.ActHolyBanner.name: Plant Holy Banner
SourceElement.ActImprovisedBrew.detail: Creates and throws either a beneficial potion at an ally or a detrimental potion at an enemy.
SourceElement.ActImprovisedBrew.name: Improvised Brew
SourceElement.ActIntimidate.detail: Intimidates the target, reducing their defenses and striking fear into nearby enemies. If you are good aligned, nearby allies will have their PV boosted. If you are evil aligned, this ability will also deal sound damage.
SourceElement.ActIntimidate.name: Intimidate
SourceElement.ActInvigorate.detail: Blesses the target with a buff that increases their life.
SourceElement.ActInvigorate.name: Invigorate
SourceElement.ActJeneiBlaze.name: Blaze
SourceElement.ActJeneiDeluge.name: Deluge
SourceElement.ActJeneiDragonFume.detail: Attack with a plume of flames.
SourceElement.ActJeneiDragonFume.name: Dragon Fume
SourceElement.ActJeneiMotherGaia.name: Mother Gaia
SourceElement.ActJeneiMove.detail: Move an object on the ground.
SourceElement.ActJeneiMove.name: Move
SourceElement.ActJeneiPly.name: Ply
SourceElement.ActJeneiReveal.name: Reveal
SourceElement.ActJeneiShinePlasma.detail: Attack with a barrage of bolts.
SourceElement.ActJeneiShinePlasma.name: Shine Plasma
SourceElement.ActLifebreak.detail: Deals a heavy melee blow that scales with how much life you are missing.
SourceElement.ActLifebreak.name: Lifebreak
SourceElement.ActLivingArmor.detail: Infuses your ally with a protective living coating which increases their PV and regenerates their health over time.
SourceElement.ActLivingArmor.name: Living Armor
SourceElement.ActLoadUp.detail: Reloads your active gun-type weapons with specialty ammo. Also applies to nearby machine allies.
SourceElement.ActLoadUp.name: Loadup
SourceElement.ActLuckyCat.detail: Grants a boost of luck to the target.
SourceElement.ActLuckyCat.name: Lucky Cat
SourceElement.ActMagicReflect.detail: Activates a reflective magical shield that will redirect an incoming magical spell at the original caster.
SourceElement.ActMagicReflect.name: Magic Reflect
SourceElement.ActManaBreak.detail: Creates a magical explosion centered around the target that deals damage based on how much mana they are missing.
SourceElement.ActManaBreak.name: Mana Break
SourceElement.ActManaStarter.detail: Sacrifices your own health to regain mana and adds a stack of Dark Traces.
SourceElement.ActManaStarter.name: Mana Starter
SourceElement.ActMarkForDeath.detail: Marks an enemy for death. Cooldown: 5 Turns.
SourceElement.ActMarkForDeath.name: Mark For Death
SourceElement.ActMarkHostiles.detail: Marks enemies in an area, reducing their ability to dodge.
SourceElement.ActMarkHostiles.name: Mark Hostiles
SourceElement.ActMoraleOrder.detail: Inspire your forces with a battle cry. Law March applies Victory March; Chaos March applies To Death. Cooldown: 10 Turns
SourceElement.ActMoraleOrder.name: Morale Order
SourceElement.ActMyriadFleche.detail: Performs a lunging magical infused melee attack, reducing the resistance against the active intonation.
SourceElement.ActMyriadFleche.name: Myriad Flèche
SourceElement.ActNullZone.detail: Establish an area around you that prevents spell casting by anyone. Can be recasted to end it early.
SourceElement.ActNullZone.name: Null Zone
SourceElement.ActOverclock.detail: Enter the Overclocking state, boosting the performance of ranged attacks. Also affects nearby machine allies.
SourceElement.ActOverclock.name: Overclock
SourceElement.ActPreparation.detail: Buffs yourself and debuffs the target in preparation to take them down. Can only be used if the target has been Marked for Death.
SourceElement.ActPreparation.name: Preparation
SourceElement.ActReap.detail: Executes a sweeping melee attack that strikes all nearby enemies within a radius of 2. Deals increased damage to enemies at full HP or under negative conditions. Inflicts Armor Break. Cooldown: 10 Turns.
SourceElement.ActReap.name: Reap
SourceElement.ActRevenge.detail: Consumes a debuff on yourself to inflict Mind damage to an enemy. Must have a removable debuff on yourself to use.
SourceElement.ActRevenge.name: Revenge
SourceElement.ActReversal.detail: Consumes all the debuffs on the target. Protection is added to the Trickster and nearby allies based on the # of debuffs consumed.
SourceElement.ActReversal.name: Reversal
SourceElement.ActRuneEtching.detail: Applies a protective talisman to an ally. When triggered by an attack, it reduces damage and knocks back the aggressor.
SourceElement.ActRuneEtching.name: Rune Etching
SourceElement.ActRunicGuard.detail: Enter a state to absorb the next elemental hit, converting damage into mana and attuning to that element.
SourceElement.ActRunicGuard.name: Runic Guard
SourceElement.ActSenseDanger.detail: Detects all sources of danger in the current zone. Cooldown: 10 Turns.
SourceElement.ActSenseDanger.name: Sense Danger
SourceElement.ActShadowShroud.detail: Blends into the shadows, rendering you invisible to nearby enemies. Increases attack damage by 25% while shrouded.
SourceElement.ActShadowShroud.name: Shadow Shroud
SourceElement.ActShieldSmite.detail: Delivers a Crushing Blow with your shield, with a chance to stun. Requires a shield to use.
SourceElement.ActShieldSmite.name: Shield Smite
SourceElement.ActShout.detail: Taunts nearby enemies to focus their attacks on you.
SourceElement.ActShout.name: Shout
SourceElement.ActSimpleSynthesis.detail: Manufactures ammunition for allies, restoring their ammo count up to 30. Also recharges Artificer Tools.
SourceElement.ActSimpleSynthesis.name: Simple Synthesis

SourceElement.ActSiphoningBlade.name: Siphoning Blade

SourceElement.ActSowWarmSeeds.name: Sow Warmth
SourceElement.ActSowWrathSeeds.detail: Summons a flower that applies detrimental effects to nearby enemies. Only one of each flower can be active. Summons a Tree Ent Warrior instead if duplicates are attempted.
SourceElement.ActSowWrathSeeds.name: Sow Wrath
SourceElement.ActSpearhead.detail: Surges toward the target, striking with holy power and summoning holy sword fragments.
SourceElement.ActSpearhead.name: Spearhead Charge
SourceElement.ActSpinningSlash.detail: Consume your elemental attunement in a spinning slash, striking all nearby enemies with an elemental slash.
SourceElement.ActSpinningSlash.name: Spinning Slash
SourceElement.ActSpinSlots.detail: Spins a set of slots to perform a random effect. This can target allies or enemies with either positive or negative effects.
SourceElement.ActSpinSlots.name: Spin Slots
SourceElement.ActSpiritMobilize.detail: Warps allied summons within a large range to the targeted location while granting them Hero.
SourceElement.ActSpiritMobilize.name: Mobilize Spirits
SourceElement.ActSpiritRage.detail: Enrages nearby summons, boosting their offensive capabilities.
SourceElement.ActSpiritRage.name: Enrage Spirits
SourceElement.ActSpiritRally.detail: Recalls allied summons within a large range to your side, healing them and enhancing their defensive capabilities.
SourceElement.ActSpiritRally.name: Rally Spirits
SourceElement.ActSpiritSummon.detail: Consumes your current Spirit Charges to summon a powerful Spirit to assist you in battle.
SourceElement.ActSpiritSummon.name: Summon
SourceElement.ActSpreadShot.detail: Attacks all enemies within a cone using ranged attacks. Must have a usable ranged weapon.
SourceElement.ActSpreadShot.name: Spreadshot
SourceElement.ActSteamlight.detail: Consumes a Platinum Nitro Charge to enter Steamlight mode, massively boosting your speed for a short time. After the mode expires, the user will be weakened temporarily. Only usable by Machines.
SourceElement.ActSteamlight.name: Steamlight
SourceElement.ActStrategyOrder.detail: Command your forces’ movements. Law March rallies them to you; Chaos March orders them to route the enemy. Cooldown: 10 Turns
SourceElement.ActStrategyOrder.name: Strategy Order
SourceElement.ActSubdue.detail: Subdues the target, lowering their attack power and suppressing their actions. If you are good aligned, you will inflict the Mana Leak Debuff that will cause attacks to steal MP from the target. If you are evil aligned, you will purge one active buff on the target.
SourceElement.ActSubdue.name: Subdue
SourceElement.ActSummonKnight.detail: Summons a Spirit Knight to aid you in battle. If no captain is active, has a 25% chance to summon a Knight Captain instead. Temporarily reduces your maximum mana.
SourceElement.ActSummonKnight.name: Summon Knight
SourceElement.ActSunder.detail: Steals a percentage of health from the target and swaps debuffs with them. Cost: 25% HP.
SourceElement.ActSunder.name: Sunder
SourceElement.ActSwordFouette.detail: Strikes all enemies within a radius of 2. Only usable while dancing.
SourceElement.ActSwordFouette.name: Sword Fouette
SourceElement.ActTacticalRetreat.detail: Leap away from the target while making a ranged attack.
SourceElement.ActTacticalRetreat.name: Tactical Retreat
SourceElement.ActTargetHand.detail: Targets the enemy’s hand with a ranged attack, attempting to disable them. Must have a usable ranged weapon.
SourceElement.ActTargetHand.name: Target Hand
SourceElement.ActTargetHead.detail: Targets the enemy’s head with a ranged attack, attempting to silence them. Must have a usable ranged weapon.
SourceElement.ActTargetHead.name: Target Head
SourceElement.ActTargetLegs.detail: Targets the enemy’s leg with a ranged attack, attempting to slow them. Must have a usable ranged weapon.
SourceElement.ActTargetLegs.name: Target Legs
SourceElement.ActThisWay.detail: Recalls you instantly to the entrance of the zone. Cooldown: 30 Turns.
SourceElement.ActThisWay.name: This Way!
SourceElement.ActThrowTrap.detail: Sets a Ranger trap at the target location that triggers when stepped on by an enemy.
SourceElement.ActThrowTrap.name: Throw Trap

SourceElement.ActTrample.name: Trample

SourceElement.ActTraumatize.name: Traumatize
SourceElement.ActWildGrowth.detail: Entangle nearby targets with toxic vines.
SourceElement.ActWildGrowth.name: Wild Growth
SourceElement.ActWildPirouette.detail: Inflicts statuses on all nearby enemies. Only usable while dancing.
SourceElement.ActWildPirouette.name: Wild Pirouette

SourceRace.alraune.detail: A forest-dwelling plant monster with the upper body of a beautiful human, appearing to rise from an enormous, bulbous flower. It releases a sweet fragrance to entice living creatures, drawing them close before ensnaring and consuming them.
SourceRace.alraune.name: Alraune
SourceRace.golem_harpytype.detail: Harpy Type Golems are flying golems, similar to the fairy race. They are fragile, but possess higher speed and evasive capabilities.
SourceRace.golem_harpytype.name: Harpy Golem
SourceRace.golem_mimtype.detail: Mim Type Golems are basic humanoid Golems. Simple, but more open to customization and upgrades.
SourceRace.golem_mimtype.name: Mim Golem
SourceRace.golem_sirentype.detail: Siren Type Golems are aquatic golems inspired by the nereids. Lacking Legs, they are far slower normally, but will show their true potential when levitating or in water.
SourceRace.golem_sirentype.name: Siren Golem
SourceRace.golem_titantype.detail: Titan Type Golems are massive humanoid golems. It differs from the other models as a model designed to protect the rider. They are incredibly durable but slow, and are good to ride.
SourceRace.golem_titantype.name: Titan Golem

SourceThing.artificer_golem_flight.name: Golem Flight Module
A harpy golem frame. Trading durability for agility, this model provides aerial support for their allies.
SourceThing.artificer_golem_frame_mim.de: A mim golem frame. This model is simple and versatile, benefiting more from upgrade chips than its cousins.
A siren golem frame. A magic oriented frame, its aquatic design allows this model truly shine in the water.
A titan golem frame. A massive model designed to protect the rider.
SourceThing.artificer_golem_limbs.detail: A pair of modular golem limbs.
SourceThing.artificer_golem_limbs.name: Golem Limb

SourceThing.artificer_golem_precept_vang: A module that installs basic melee functions into a golem.
